storeSelect.title: Select Store
storeSelect.qrHelp: Point the store QR code at the camera
storeSelect.cameraError: Failed to start camera. Please use manual selection.

help.title: Help
help.step1: Scan a QR code or select a store from the list
help.step2: Search for products by name or category on the search screen
help.step3: View the product's display location on the map screen
help.faq1A: Please allow camera permissions. Also check that the QR code is well-lit.
help.faq2A: Try changing your search keywords. Products out of stock won't appear in search results.
help.faq3A: Clearing browser data will also delete favorites. We recommend regular backups.
help.faq4A: Select 'Change Store' from the menu screen.
help.faq5A: Updated daily at midnight. Check the Deals page for the latest information.
help.contactText: For other questions, please contact us at the email address below.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.article1Content: These Terms set forth the conditions for using this service between all users and the Company. By using this service, users are deemed to have agreed to these Terms.
terms.article2Content: Those wishing to use this service must agree to these Terms, apply for registration by the Company's specified method, and registration is completed upon Company approval.
terms.article3Content: Users shall not engage in the following acts:
terms.article3Item1: Acts violating laws or public order and morals
terms.article3Item3: Acts that destroy or interfere with the Company's servers or network functions
terms.article3Item4: Acts that may interfere with service operation
terms.article3Item5: Acts of collecting or accumulating personal information about other users
terms.article3Item7: Other acts deemed inappropriate by the Company
terms.article4Content: The Company may suspend or interrupt all or part of the service without prior notice if any of the following occur:
terms.article4Item1: When performing system maintenance or updates
terms.article4Item2: When service becomes difficult due to force majeure such as earthquakes, lightning, fire, power outages, or natural disasters
terms.article4Item3: When computers or communication lines stop due to accidents
terms.article4Item4: When the Company deems service provision difficult for other reasons
terms.article5Content: The Company shall not be liable for any transactions, communications, or disputes arising between users and other users or third parties.
terms.article6Content: The Company may change service content or discontinue service without notifying users, and shall not be liable for any resulting user damage.
terms.article7Content: The Company may change these Terms at any time without notifying users when deemed necessary. Users who start using the service after changes are deemed to have agreed to the changed Terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The Company pays utmost attention to protecting customers' personal information and handles it based on the following policy.
privacy.section1Content: The Company collects personal information to the extent necessary for the following purposes:
privacy.section1Item1: To provide and operate this service
privacy.section1Item3: To improve services and develop new features
privacy.section1Item4: To respond to Terms of Service violations
privacy.section2Content: This service may collect the following information:
privacy.section3Content: Collected personal information is used for the following purposes:
privacy.section4Content: The Company will not provide personal information to third parties without user consent, except in the following cases:
privacy.section4Item1: When based on laws and regulations
privacy.section4Item2: When necessary to protect life, body, or property
privacy.section4Item3: When particularly necessary for public health or sound child development
privacy.section5Content: This service uses cookies and local storage to improve user convenience. These can be disabled in browser settings, but some features may become unavailable.
privacy.section6Content: The Company maintains accuracy of personal information and manages it securely. We implement appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access, loss, destruction, alteration, and leakage.
privacy.section7Content: Users can request the Company to disclose, correct, or delete personal information. Please contact our inquiry desk for request methods.
privacy.section8Content: The Company may change this policy as necessary. Changed policy takes effect when posted on this service.
privacy.contactContent: For inquiries regarding personal information handling, please contact us at:
